title: iberis grosmiquelii subsp. senneniana
intro: Iberis grosmiquelii subsp. senneniana, also known as Sennen's rock-cress, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Iberis grosmiquelii subsp. senneniana include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant, often in the form of infusions or decoctions, are used to harness its medicinal properties.
